description: Karplus rings past env idle. Signal chain `sample->filter->ampEnv->insert` means the insert sits AFTER the env-gate, so Karplus feedback decays at its own natural rate (not gated by env release).

assertions.name: first_hit_audible
assertions.comment: First trigger at step 0 -- amp env attack + Karplus excitation should produce a strong RMS

assertions.name: karplus_tail_past_env_idle
assertions.comment: Amp env decay is 300ms => env idle around t=1.3s; Karplus loop with 80% feedback must still ring audibly at t=1.4s+
